mapper.select: SELECT id FROM jq_sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT role_id FROM jq_sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY role_id
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM jq_sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY user_id
SELECT DISTINCT ur.user_id FROM jq_sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN jq_sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE rm.menu_id = #{menuId} ORDER BY ur.user_id
